rationale: The cited paper is methodologically adjacent (probit-based modeling of individualized digital marketing responses) and could plausibly be a background/foundational source for the citing paper’s coupon-response modeling, even though domains differ (email customization vs. SMS coupon redemption). However, the matched evidence is only a single DOI entry (reference_index 4) with no title/snippet or local citation context, so substantive use cannot be confirmed from current evidence.
